recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by at least 2% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The latest [now] WTI signal shows the price at 88 $/bbl up +1.35%, not dropping 2%, and all prior signals show gains.

recent.statement: CL=F will increase by 2% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows CL=F increased by 2% within the window, and a move that large would have been recorded.

recent.statement: A cyberattack will occur on a major oil company within the next week.
recent.evidence: No signal reports any cyberattack on an oil company; signals only show oil prices, FOMC schedules, and volatility indices.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in the Philippines within the next week.
recent.evidence: The three named tropical cyclones (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are located far from the Philippines with zero population affected, and no signal shows any cyclone landfall in the Philippines.

recent.statement: CL=F price will increase by more than 1%
recent.evidence: S11 shows WTI Crude Oil (CL=F) at 88.12 $/bbl, up +1.49%, exceeding the 1% increase threshold within the window.

recent.statement: A significant flood will occur in the Mississippi River basin within the next week, causing widespread damage and disruption.
recent.evidence: No signal reports a significant Mississippi River basin flood causing widespread damage during the closed window, though such an event would have been captured.

recent.statement: A major cyber attack will occur on a prominent US company within the next week, resulting in significant data breaches and financial losses.
recent.evidence: No admissible signal provides text showing a major cyber attack with significant data breaches and financial losses on a prominent US company during the window.

recent.statement: The value of Bitcoin will drop by more than 10% within the next week.
recent.evidence: No signal reports Bitcoin's price at all, and calm markets (VIX 16.64, -2.4%) show no evidence of a >10% Bitcoin drop within the window.

recent.statement: A major wildfire will break out in California
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a major California wildfire would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in Vietnam
recent.evidence: The only cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are located far from Vietnam with zero populations affected, and no signal shows any cyclone landfall in Vietnam during the window.

recent.statement: The US will launch airstrikes against Iranian missile sites within the next week.
recent.evidence: The only signal concerns the DRC eastern conflict and says nothing about US airstrikes on Iranian missile sites, which such a major event would certainly have generated a signal.

recent.statement: US crude oil price will rise by at least 1.5% in the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: S1 shows WTI crude at +2.19% during the forecast window, exceeding the 1.5% rise threshold.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
